title: Miantuan Pod
intro: Skills for remembering imaginary companions, shaping them into clear dossiers, and optionally hatching them into Codex pets.

skills.name: structured-question
skills.purpose: Ask one focused decision or preference question at a time.

skills.name: recall-imaginary-friend
skills.purpose: Guide an imaginary-friend recall session and produce a careful companion dossier.

skills.name: recall-to-pet
skills.purpose: Connect recall, concept art, pet hatching, and optional gallery submission.
